children.heading: Enforcement authority
children.label: a Enforcement authority
children.text: The authority to enforce this chapter shall be carried out by the Secretary of the Treasury. The Secretary of the Treasury shall exercise the authorities of the Trading With the Enemy Act [ et seq.] in enforcing this chapter. In carrying out this subsection, the Secretary of the Treasury shall take the necessary steps to ensure that activities permitted under are carried out for the purposes set forth in this chapter and not for purposes of the accumulation by the Cuban Government of excessive amounts of United States currency or the accumulation of excessive profits by any person or entity.50 U.S.C. 4301section 6004 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of the Treasury such sums as may be necessary to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Applicability of penalties
children.label: d Applicability of penalties
children.text: The penalties set forth in section 16 of the Trading With the Enemy Act [] shall apply to violations of this chapter to the same extent as such penalties apply to violations under that Act [ et seq.].50 U.S.C. 431550 U.S.C. 4301

children.heading: Office of Foreign Assets Control
children.label: e Office of Foreign Assets Control
children.text: The Department of the Treasury shall establish and maintain a branch of the Office of Foreign Assets Control in Miami, Florida, in order to strengthen the enforcement of this chapter.
